summary: Navigation and UI testing for P0 (PDF Import fix) and P1 (Back Navigation bug fix). Code review verified router.replace usage in key navigation flows. Frontend environment has ngrok tunnel connectivity issues preventing live UI testing.

infrastructure_issues.issue: ngrok tunnel took too long to connect
infrastructure_issues.impact: Frontend service (expo) keeps restarting, preventing live UI testing
infrastructure_issues.error: CommandError: ngrok tunnel took too long to connect

competitionHistory_line_188.description: View Results from Competition History uses router.replace (prevents back stack buildup)

importPdf_line_266.description: After importing PDF, goes to Competition History with router.replace

competitionSummary_line_58.description: Finish button from Competition Summary goes to Home with router.replace

summary_line_361.description: Save session (training) uses router.replace to go Home

summary_line_387.description: Discard session uses router.replace to go Home

history_to_report.description: Uses router.push so back button in Report returns to History

report_back_button.description: Report screen uses router.back() allowing return to History
